summary: fetchFullPlaylist helper paginates /playlists/{id}/tracks for T1 diff, T2 dedupe, and T3 merge so playlists over 100 tracks are not silently truncated.
reason: GET /playlists/{id} embeds tracks as a PagingObject with a hard cap of 100. All three commands previously consumed `pl.Tracks.Items` from that single call, so any playlist over 100 tracks produced a wrong (not empty) snapshot/dedupe/merge. The new helper fetches metadata via ?fields=id,name,snapshot_id and tracks via paginated /playlists/{id}/tracks. Generator-side fix tracked in mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#1277.
